title: Maycarios's Extended Recipes
body:
Maycarios Extended Recipes 0.0.5 is on WIP

ABOUT

Maycarios's Extended Recipe Datapack is a datapack that extends Minecraft recipes. As for the 0.0.4 update, this datapack add 1323 recipes to Minecraft. But in the future, I will add more and more recipes, hopefully. So what are you waiting for? Go Ahead download and install this datapack to your Minecraft world now! Thank you <3


INSTALLATION

Download Maycarios's Extended Recipe Datapack.zip put the datapack .zip file into the datapack folder of your Minecraft world saves or drag the zip file upon the world creation to datapack page"

Check the Planet Minecraft page too!
